center.name: 尼罗河三角洲
center.summary: 尼罗河三角洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Kittlitz's plover，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Kittlitz's plover is distributed throughout most of sub-Saharan Africa, but is also native to Madagascar and the Nile River Delta.Urban, E.K., C.H

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Kittlitz's plover is distributed throughout most of sub-Saharan Africa, but is also native to Madagascar and the Nile River Delta.Urban, E.K., C.H
